languages.text: "Риски летального исхода? Любые риски ничтожны, если речь идет о преодолении порога умирания. Обе моих попытки создать Триасомату потерпели провал, а следовательно, стоит обратиться к иной методологии". {n}Он обращает мутный взгляд к вам.{/n} "Ваши мысли на сей счет меня весьма интересуют, коллега — так позвольте же им течь свободно".

"Risks of a fatal outcome? The risks are negligible when what is at stake is crossing the limit of death itself. Both of my attempts to create a Triasomata have failed, and so it is necessary to apply a different methodology." {n}He turns his clouded gaze to you.{/n} "Your thoughts on this matter interest me greatly, my colleague — so let them flow freely."
languages.original_text: "Риски летального исхода? Любые риски ничтожны, если речь идет о преодолении порога умирания. Обе моих попытки создать Триасомату потерпели провал, а следовательно, стоит обратиться к иной методологии". {n}Он обращает мутный взгляд к вам.{/n} "Ваши мысли на сей счет меня весьма интересуют, коллега — так позвольте же им течь свободно".

Both of my attempts to create a Triasomata have failed, and so it is necessary to apply a different methodology." {n}He turns his clouded gaze to you.{/n} "Your thoughts on this matter interest me greatly, my colleague — so let them flow freely."

"Risks of a fatal outcome? The risks are negligible when what is at stake is crossing the limit of death itself. Both of my attempts to create a Triasomata have failed, and so it is necessary to apply a different methodology." {n}He turns his clouded gaze to you.{/n} "Your thoughts on this matter interest me greatly, my colleague — so let them flow freely."

"Risks of a fatal outcome? The risks are negligible when what is at stake is crossing the limit of death itself. Both of my attempts to create a Triasomata have failed, and so it is necessary to apply a different methodology." {n}He turns his clouded gaze to you.{/n} "Your thoughts on this matter interest me greatly, my colleague — so let them flow freely."

languages.text: "Risiken eines tödlichen Ausgangs? Die Risiken sind vernachlässigbar, wenn es darum geht, die Grenzen des Todes zu überschreiten. Meine beiden Versuche, einen Triasomata zu erschaffen, sind gescheitert, also muss ich mich einer anderen Methodik bedienen." {n}Er wendet seinen getrübten Blick dir zu.{/n} "Eure Gedanken hinsichtlich dieser Angelegenheit interessieren mich sehr, {mf|Kollege|Kollegin} ... also sagt sie frei heraus."
languages.original_text: "Risks of a fatal outcome? The risks are negligible when what is at stake is crossing the limit of death itself. Both of my attempts to create a Triasomata have failed, and so it is necessary to apply a different methodology." {n}He turns his clouded gaze to you.{/n} "Your thoughts on this matter interest me greatly, my colleague — so let them flow freely."

traits.locale_text: "Risiken eines tödlichen Ausgangs? Die Risiken sind vernachlässigbar, wenn es darum geht, die Grenzen des Todes zu überschreiten. Meine beiden Versuche, einen Triasomata zu erschaffen, sind gescheitert, also muss ich mich einer anderen Methodik bedienen." {n}Er wendet seinen getrübten Blick dir zu.{/n} "Eure Gedanken hinsichtlich dieser Angelegenheit interessieren mich sehr, {mf|Kollege|Kollegin} ... also sagt sie frei heraus."

languages.text: « Les risques de décès ? Ils sont négligeables face à la possibilité de repousser les limites de la mort même. Mes deux tentatives de création de Triasomata ont échoué. Il faut donc que j'emploie une méthodologie différente. » {n}Son regard voilé se tourne vers vous.{/n} « Votre avis à ce sujet m'intéresse au plus haut point, {mf|cher|chère} collègue. Dites-moi tout. »
languages.original_text: "Risks of a fatal outcome? The risks are negligible when what is at stake is crossing the limit of death itself. Both of my attempts to create a Triasomata have failed, and so it is necessary to apply a different methodology." {n}He turns his clouded gaze to you.{/n} "Your thoughts on this matter interest me greatly, my colleague — so let them flow freely."

traits.locale_text: « Les risques de décès ? Ils sont négligeables face à la possibilité de repousser les limites de la mort même. Mes deux tentatives de création de Triasomata ont échoué. Il faut donc que j'emploie une méthodologie différente. » {n}Son regard voilé se tourne vers vous.{/n} « Votre avis à ce sujet m'intéresse au plus haut point, {mf|cher|chère} collègue. Dites-moi tout. »

languages.text: “致死风险？当目标是跨越死亡本身的界限时，这些风险微不足道。我两次制造三相体的尝试均告失败，因此必须采用不同的方法。”{n}他将浑浊的目光转向你。{/n}“我很想知道，您对此有何见解。请畅所欲言，我的同僚。”
languages.original_text: "Risks of a fatal outcome? The risks are negligible when what is at stake is crossing the limit of death itself. Both of my attempts to create a Triasomata have failed, and so it is necessary to apply a different methodology." {n}He turns his clouded gaze to you.{/n} "Your thoughts on this matter interest me greatly, my colleague — so let them flow freely."

traits.locale_text: “致死风险？当目标是跨越死亡本身的界限时，这些风险微不足道。我两次制造三相体的尝试均告失败，因此必须采用不同的方法。”{n}他将浑浊的目光转向你。{/n}“我很想知道，您对此有何见解。请畅所欲言，我的同僚。”

languages.text: «¿Peligro de un desenlace fatal? Los riesgos son negligibles cuando está en juego la superación de la propia muerte. Mis dos intentos de crear un triasómata han fracasado, por lo que hace falta un cambio de metodología». {n}Gira su mirada nublada hacia ti.{/n} «Me interesaría conocer su opinión, mi estimad{mf|o|a} colega».
languages.original_text: "Risks of a fatal outcome? The risks are negligible when what is at stake is crossing the limit of death itself. Both of my attempts to create a Triasomata have failed, and so it is necessary to apply a different methodology." {n}He turns his clouded gaze to you.{/n} "Your thoughts on this matter interest me greatly, my colleague — so let them flow freely."

traits.locale_text: «¿Peligro de un desenlace fatal? Los riesgos son negligibles cuando está en juego la superación de la propia muerte. Mis dos intentos de crear un triasómata han fracasado, por lo que hace falta un cambio de metodología». {n}Gira su mirada nublada hacia ti.{/n} «Me interesaría conocer su opinión, mi estimad{mf|o|a} colega».

languages.text: 「致命的な結果のリスク、だと？死そのものの限界を越えることが懸かっているとき、そのようなリスクなど取るに足らない。トリアソマタを創り出そうとした私の二度の試みはいずれも失敗した。ゆえに、別の方法論を適用する必要がある。」{n}彼は曇ったまなざしを君に向ける。{/n}「この件についての君の考えに、私は大いに興味がある、我が同僚よ――どうか存分に述べたまえ。」
languages.original_text: "Risks of a fatal outcome? The risks are negligible when what is at stake is crossing the limit of death itself. Both of my attempts to create a Triasomata have failed, and so it is necessary to apply a different methodology." {n}He turns his clouded gaze to you.{/n} "Your thoughts on this matter interest me greatly, my colleague — so let them flow freely."

traits.locale_text: 「致命的な結果のリスク、だと？死そのものの限界を越えることが懸かっているとき、そのようなリスクなど取るに足らない。トリアソマタを創り出そうとした私の二度の試みはいずれも失敗した。ゆえに、別の方法論を適用する必要がある。」{n}彼は曇ったまなざしを君に向ける。{/n}「この件についての君の考えに、私は大いに興味がある、我が同僚よ――どうか存分に述べたまえ。」

languages.text: "Ölümcül sonuç riski mi? Söz konusu bizzat ölüm sınırını aşmak olduğunda riskler, ihmal edilebilir düzeydedir. Üçyeköz yaratmaya yönelik iki girişimim de başarısız oldu. Bu nedenle farklı bir metodoloji uygulamak gerekli." {n}Bulanık bakışlarını sana çeviriyor.{/n} "Bu konudaki düşüncelerin ilgimi fazlasıyla çekiyor meslektaşım. O yüzden özgürce düşünebilirsin."
languages.original_text: "Risks of a fatal outcome? The risks are negligible when what is at stake is crossing the limit of death itself. Both of my attempts to create a Triasomata have failed, and so it is necessary to apply a different methodology." {n}He turns his clouded gaze to you.{/n} "Your thoughts on this matter interest me greatly, my colleague — so let them flow freely."

Bu nedenle farklı bir metodoloji uygulamak gerekli." {n}Bulanık bakışlarını sana çeviriyor.{/n} "Bu konudaki düşüncelerin ilgimi fazlasıyla çekiyor meslektaşım. O yüzden özgürce düşünebilirsin."
